understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each KA59 level by moving the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked '+' in the semantic grid was simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece, then repeat across levels until the game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you could MOVE in the four directions, which attempts to shift the currently selected piece by one 3-pixel cell; movement could be blocked by walls/boundaries or adjacent objects, and some adjacent objects (blocks) could be pushed if directly in the movement direction with space to move. Levels could contain multiple selectable pieces; you switch control by CLICKing the exact pixel position of another selectable. The movement.*_blocked flags were only hints about adjacency and not a guaranteed success/failure indicator.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each KA59 level by moving the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked '+' in the semantic grid was simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece, then repeat across levels until the game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you could MOVE in the four directions, which attempts to shift the currently selected piece by one 3-pixel cell; movement could be blocked by walls/boundaries or adjacent objects, and some adjacent objects (blocks) could be pushed if directly in the movement direction with space to move. Levels could contain multiple selectable pieces; you switch control by CLICKing the exact pixel position of another selectable. The movement.*_blocked flags were only hints about adjacency and not a guaranteed success/failure indicator.
